candidate.completion: lower your standards before I raise my hopes.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please lower your standards before I raise my hopes.

evaluation.rationale: The mirrored pivot between "lower your standards" and "raise my hopes" is clean, compact, and logically legible, giving the line a solid self-reversing structure. Its common phrasing keeps it from feeling fully fresh or truly elegant, but the turn lands with real force.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
